summary: Iteration 57 - Post-contract signing workflow features testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: admin dashboard with today's reservations, stats cards, new reservation button, reservations page with 3-column card grid, and client profile with 'Mes Reservations' section.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes in React Native Web components are not propagating to the DOM - this is expected React Native Web behavior, not a bug
TodayReservationCard and ReservationCard components have proper data-testid attributes but they don't appear in the browser DOM
The 'Reservations du jour' section required expo restart to render - this could be a hot reload issue during development

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All requested features visible and functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API endpoints for today reservations, client reservations, document check, and contract operations are fully working. Frontend components TodayReservationCard, ReservationCard, and ReservationActionModal are rendering correctly. Note: data-testid attributes don't propagate to browser DOM in React Native Web - use text-based or structure-based selectors for Playwright tests.

backend.GET /api/admin/reservations/today: PASS - Returns today's reservations with user_name and vehicle_name
backend.GET /api/client/reservations: PASS - Returns client reservations with vehicle_name and contract info
backend.PUT /api/contracts/{id}/sign: PASS - Contract signing endpoint with reservation_status and email_sent fields

frontend.Admin dashboard - Today reservations sec: PASS - Shows cards with user/vehicle names, status, quick actions
frontend.Admin dashboard - Stats cards: PASS - Shows vehicles, reservations, clients, revenue
frontend.Reservations page - 3-column card grid: PASS - Cards with quick status buttons (Confi, Activ, Termi, Annul)
frontend.Client profile - Mes Reservations sectio: PASS - Shows reservations with contract view/download buttons
